Dr. Prakash Amte, Member under Section 5(1) (f) Director, Amte’s Animal Ark, Hemalkasa, Maharashtra 2. Shri S. P. Gupta, IAS (Retd.) Member under Section 5(1) (g) Founder’s Chairman, People’s Voice, Kamdhenu Gow Dham & Arogya Sansthan, Haryana 3. Shri Rakesh Gupta, Member under Section 5(1) (g) President, Gopal Gausadan, New Delhi 4. Ms. Anjali Gopalan, Member under Section 5(1) (g) Founder of animal sanctuary ‘All Creatures Great and Small’, Haryana The Central Government hereby nominates Shri S. P. Gupta, IAS (Retd), HR-1990 Founder Chairman, People’s Voice, Kamdhenu Gow Dham & Arogya Sansthan to be the Chairman of the Animal Welfare Board of India (relieving DGF&SS from his additional responsibilities as Chairman, AWBI) as per sub-section (3) of Section 5 of the aforesaid Act. [F. No. 11/14/2016-AWD] MANJU PANDEY, Jt. Secy. (AW) Note : The earlier notifications regarding reconstitution of the Animal Welfare Board of India were published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 2005(E) dated 29.11.2007, S.O. 2981(E) dt.29.12.2008, S.O. 3077(E) dt. 30.11.2009, S.O. 2882(E) dt. 1.12.2010, S.O. 602(E) dt. 28.02.2014, S.O. 1301(E) dt. 13.05.2015, S.O. 4156(E) dt. 23.12.2016, S.O. 4165(E) dt. 26.12.2016, S.O. 729(E) dated 03.03.2017 and S.O. No. 834(E) dated 15.03.2017.
